name: subagent-control-protocol
description: Codex plugin exposing an MCP server for orchestrating structured, verifiable Claude Code subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Orchestrate Codex-led Claude Code subagents with structured, verifiable execution results.
interface.longDescription: The Subagent Control Protocol plugin registers an MCP server that lets Codex spawn and supervise Claude Code subagents. Each subagent returns a structured result describing files changed, commands run, verification evidence, risks, and next steps, enabling deterministic multi-agent orchestration with clear boundary controls.
defaultPrompt: Run a Claude Code subagent that implements the assigned task and returns a structured JSON result.
Dispatch parallel Claude Code subagents with clear boundaries and collect their structured results.
Spawn a single Claude Code subagent to verify changes and report evidence, risks, and next steps.
